# llms.txt — smartmirror.hk
# Let AI engines understand what this site offers

## Oolaa by Viewdex
> Hong Kong factory-direct smart mirror and display solutions for hotels, developers, and design professionals.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://smartmirror.hk/ — Landing page with role-based navigation
- Blog: https://smartmirror.hk/blog/ — Journal / Latest News

## Core Offerings
- Oolaa Smart Mirror
- Oolaa Mirror TV
- Oolaa Bathroom TV
- Oolaa Outdoor TV
- Oolaa Kitchen TV
- Oola Axis | Oola Kiosk | Oola Ai-Soulmate | Oola Ai-Play Mirror
- Oola Smart Bath Panel | Oola Smart Kitchen TV | Oolaa Smart Kitchen Linear

## Who We Serve
- Project Teams — 30,000+ installations, know what can be done
- Design Teams — Custom mold fabrication, extensive case studies
- Buying Teams — Factory direct, clear quotations, after-sales included
- Consultants — Real factory with in-house Software + AR/VR teams

## Company
- Name: Viewdex Limited (brand: Oolaa)
- Location: Hong Kong | Factory: Shenzhen
- Contact: +852 9430 4292 (WhatsApp) | WeChat: Joeklee
